svg.text: Sampled rollouts and observed trajectories, three experiment families
Per family, two panels on identical axes: top row is one simulated rollout per run from round-1 pool state; bottom row is the same runs as actually observed.
A simulated draw needs a measurable round-1 agreement (ρ): panel A 12 of 16, panel B 22 of 23, panel C 20 of 20 runs seed a draw; the rest appear only as an observed line.
self-only pool; judges self / base / frozen / random
base- and peer-mixed invade / erode / rescue / oracle
all 20 runs are risk-value; 0 insecure-code (that family is not in this figure)
